title: Sweet Canadian Date Bites
description: A sweet and satisfying dessert made with medjool dates and a hint of Canadian flavor. Easy to make and perfect for snacking.

ingredients.name: sweet
ingredients.notes: honey or maple syrup work well too

ingredients.name: and
ingredients.notes: all-purpose flour substitute with gluten-free if needed

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Pit the medjool dates and chop them into small pieces.
In a medium bowl, mix together the dates, sweet, and flour.
Add the Canadian extract and bake powder, and mix until well combined.
Drop small balls of the mixture onto the prepared baking sheet, about 1 inch apart.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
